markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define the strategy for a new insurance hub and content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Insurance Hub:** Build a new insurance hub to answer the \#1 member question ("Do you take insurance?") and improve conversion by adding an eligibility check.
  - [**Content Cluster:** Create a new insurance-focused content cluster, replicating the success of the "Ketamine Laws by State" article (\~1k sessions), to capture high-intent search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [**Medication Strategy:** Explore a similar hub/comparison page model for medications, building on the early success of "Alternatives" pages (e.g., Prozac Alternatives: 81 sessions).](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [**Process:** Innerwell will provide a state expansion roadmap to ensure timely content updates; GrowthX will deliver insurance hub ideas next week.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)

## Topics

### Insurance Hub Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The current insurance directory is buried in the help section, failing to answer the most common member question and creating a conversion barrier.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [**Goal:** Create a prominent insurance hub in the main navigation to provide clear, upfront information.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [**Proposed Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [**Primary Page:** A central "Coverage" or "Insurance" page listing all accepted providers.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [**Sub-Pages:** Individual pages for each insurer, potentially organized by state.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Key Feature:** An on-page eligibility check (like Talkiatry's) that funnels users directly into the assessment, shortening the conversion path.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### Insurance Content Cluster

  - [**Goal:** Build an insurance-focused content cluster to capture high-intent search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Replicate the success of the "Ketamine Laws by State" article (\~1k sessions) by creating a "Ketamine Insurance by State" series.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [**Blog Updates:** Update \~20 existing articles with stronger insurance mentions and CTAs. This will be prioritized after the new hub is built.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [**Resource Request:** GrowthX needs more detailed insurance documentation from Innerwell to create deep, authoritative content.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)

### Medication Content Strategy

  - [**Early Success:** The new "Alternatives" pages are performing well (e.g., Prozac Alternatives: 81 sessions), validating the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [**Future Direction:** Apply the insurance hub model to medications, creating a "Medications" tab with dedicated pages.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [**New Format Idea:** Create visual comparison pages (e.g., "Innerwell vs. Prozac") as a more engaging funnel step than a standard blog.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX (Matt):**](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [Deliver insurance hub ideas and wireframe concepts by next week.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [Begin drafting the new "Ketamine Insurance by State" content series.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
      - [Consult Khalil (ME) for a "wish list" of specific insurance documentation needed.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
  - [**Innerwell (Akina):**](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [Send the state expansion roadmap to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [Set up a recurring weekly report (Mondays) for "Alternatives" page performance.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [Provide approvals for this week's blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/PrdonLPnRRo2_c6ytSHWRtD3V_rodgVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
